parameters.sink_construction: 16 structured phase paths per t: 4 offsets (2 random + negations) x 4 lanes of per-step-permuted quartet {0,pi/2,pi,3pi/2}; negation-symmetric set; every phase then multiplied by dose_scale S (S=1 = ceiling, bit-exact); shared across bases and both sink configs; 250 shots each, pooled per (t, basis); per-step retention r and gamma=-ln r recorded in sink_phases[t].retention

selection_rule.ranking: uniformity = minT2/maxT2 desc, tie-break minT2 desc

parameters.noise_model: T2echo_vs_T2star (Ramsey ratios); sink = literal frozen RZ paths [sim + hardware]

dose_recommendation.definition: r(S) = mean over (t, step) of |(1/16) sum_k e^{i S phi_k}| from a trial freeze at the run seed; r* = exp(-N/T2_interior * tau_step)
